en: Setup and dismantling must occur under supervision of a competent person.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 18(2)(2)
Permissible loads must be clearly marked on lifting equipment and slings.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 18(7)

The stability of equipment during lifting must be ensured through defined safety measures. A secure setup on stable ground must be ensured for lifting equipment.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 18(2)
